scripts.stop:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$p=3000; $conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($c in $conns){ try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output 'Stopped backend port (if active).'"
scripts.stop:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=@(3000,5173); foreach($p in $ports){ $conns=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach($c in $conns){ try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} } }; Write-Output 'Stopped dev ports (if active).'"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run stop:dev && npm run dev
